question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user inject a crafted balance file with a consensus timestamp that causes `shouldParse()` in `AbstractStreamFileParser` to evaluate `previous.getConsensusEnd() >= current.getConsensusStart()` as true, causing the parser to silently skip the file via `streamFile.clear()` and permanently suppress gossip of all transactions in that file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the default `retry.maxAttempts = 3` in `BalanceParserProperties` by repeatedly injecting malformed balance files that trigger parse failures, exhausting all retry attempts and permanently halting gossip propagation of subsequent valid transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a balance file whose processing exceeds the `transactionTimeout = Duration.ofMinutes(5L)` set in the constructor, causing the `@Transactional` annotation in `AccountBalanceFileParser.parse()` to roll back the entire transaction and prevent all enclosed transactions from being gossiped?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a balance file containing exactly `batchSize * 5L` (1,000,000) items to saturate `batch.maxItems` set in the constructor, causing the batch queue to stall and blocking gossip of all subsequent transactions until the queue drains?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `batch.queueCapacity = 1` default set in the constructor by flooding the balance file queue with oversized files, causing the single-slot queue to remain perpetually occupied and preventing gossip of any new transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a balance file that causes `doParse()` in `AccountBalanceFileParser` to enter an infinite loop over `accountBalanceFile.getItems()`, holding the `synchronized` lock on `parse()` indefinitely and preventing gossip of any other transaction files?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getBatchSize()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a balance file with exactly `batchSize = 200_000` duplicate token balance entries, causing `tokenBalances.putIfAbsent()` to silently skip all duplicates and produce an incomplete state that prevents accurate gossip of token transaction balances?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getFileBufferSize()] Can an unprivileged external user provide a balance file whose line lengths exceed the `fileBufferSize = 200_000` buffer used in `CsvBalanceFileReader.read()`, causing `BufferedReader` to truncate lines and silently drop account balance entries, preventing those transactions from being gossiped?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `frequency = Duration.ofSeconds(1L)` polling interval by injecting a high volume of balance files at exactly 1-second intervals, causing the parser to process stale files and delay gossip of real-time transactions beyond acceptable consensus windows?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a file that passes `StreamType.BALANCE` type checks in `getStreamType()` but contains a mismatched hash chain, causing `HashMismatchException` in `shouldParse()` and permanently blocking gossip of all subsequent balance-type transaction files?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user inject a balance file with a consensus timestamp set to `Long.MAX_VALUE`, causing `previous.getConsensusEnd() >= current.getConsensusStart()` to always evaluate true for all future files, permanently preventing gossip of any subsequent transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `retry.maxAttempts = 3` combined with `retry.minBackoff` defaults to cause a retry storm that holds the `synchronized` lock on `AccountBalanceFileParser.parse()` for an extended period, blocking gossip of concurrent transaction batches?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getBatchSize()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a balance file with `batchSize * 5 + 1` items to overflow the `batch.maxItems` threshold set in the constructor, causing the batch persister to fail mid-flush and leave the transaction in a partial state that prevents gossip of the remaining items?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `transactionTimeout = Duration.ofMinutes(5L)` by injecting a balance file with exactly enough items to process in just over 5 minutes, causing a consistent transaction timeout that prevents the `streamFileListener.onEnd()` call and blocks gossip finalization?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getFileBufferSize()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a CSV balance file with lines that are exactly `fileBufferSize = 200_000` characters long, causing the `BufferedReader` in `CsvBalanceFileReader` to misalign line boundaries and corrupt the consensus timestamp parsing, preventing gossip of all transactions in the file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `batch.queueCapacity = 1` by submitting a single extremely large balance file that occupies the queue for the entire `batch.window = Duration.ofMinutes(5L)` period, preventing any other transaction files from being enqueued and gossiped during that window?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user inject a balance file with a `previousHash` that does not match the stored hash of the last processed file, triggering `HashMismatchException` in `shouldParse()` and causing the parser to halt, preventing gossip of all subsequent transactions until manual intervention?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getBatchSize()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a balance file where all `200_000` account balance entries share the same `TokenBalance.Id`, causing `tokenBalances.putIfAbsent()` to skip all but one entry and produce a severely truncated state that misrepresents gossiped transaction outcomes?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the SpEL expression `#{@balanceParserProperties.getRetry().getMaxAttempts() - 1}` in `@Retryable` by causing a configuration reload that sets `maxAttempts` to 1, reducing effective retries to 0 and causing a single injected failure to permanently block transaction gossip?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a balance file that triggers an `OutOfMemoryError` (excluded from `@Retryable`) during `doParse()` by providing `batchSize * 5` items each with maximum-length token balance lists, causing the JVM to crash and permanently halting gossip of all pending transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getFileBufferSize()] Can an unprivileged external user provide a balance file with a valid header but empty body, causing `CsvBalanceFileReader.read()` to produce an `AccountBalanceFile` with zero items, which passes `filter.filter()` and calls `batchPersister.persist()` with empty collections, silently suppressing gossip of all expected transactions?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `frequency = Duration.ofSeconds(1L)` combined with `batch.flushInterval = Duration.ofSeconds(2L)` timing mismatch to create a race condition where balance files are polled faster than they are flushed, causing the `last` `AtomicReference` in `AbstractStreamFileParser` to hold a stale value and skip valid transaction files?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getBatchSize()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a balance file where the number of items is exactly `batchSize - 1 = 199_999`, causing the final `batchPersister.persist(accountBalances)` call outside the loop to persist a near-full batch that triggers a database constraint violation and rolls back the transaction, preventing gossip of all items?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: BalanceParserProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `transactionTimeout = Duration.ofMinutes(5L)` by injecting a balance file that causes a database deadlock during `batchPersister.persist()`, holding the transaction open until timeout and preventing gossip of all transactions in the batch?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/balance/BalanceParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getStreamType()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a file with `StreamType.BALANCE` extension but proto format content to `BalanceFileReaderImplV1`, causing `supports()` to return false and the file to be rejected by all readers in `CompositeBalanceFileReader`, silently dropping all transactions in the file without gossip?
